focus: Arena Field Edition — set up cosign signing of the proven-matrix images (deploy/field-edition/cosign/{sign,verify}-proven-matrix.sh + README), ready for the operator to ARM (§9/M3). PIVOTED keyless→KEY-BASED: the first arm attempt surfaced that fulcio.sigstore.dev (the keyless CA) is network-blocked on the Spark box (answers 443 in plaintext, persistent, no proxy) while Rekor + the TUF root are reachable — so reworked to a long-lived Ed25519 key that still uploads to the public Rekor log, with the public key committed + pinned (proven-matrix.pub), mirroring how the repo pins the license key in TRUSTED_KEYS (operator chose this via AskUserQuestion). Scope derives live from fieldkit so it never drifts from compose.py: signs only Orionfold-built GHCR digest-pinned images — today exactly the CUDA-13 lane (sha256:93993cc2…); skips pgvector (upstream) + the NIM embedder (NVIDIA); auto-includes cortex-embedder at v1.1. sign defaults to DRY-RUN (smoked green); --sign generates the key into ~/.orionfold/cosign (COSIGN_PASSWORD-encrypted), publishes proven-matrix.pub, key-signs + uploads to Rekor; verify runs cosign verify --key, the check the installer's M3 LiveUpdateChannel mirrors. cosign v2.4.1 installed; GHCR write auth as orionfold done. Not a first-boot blocker (pulls work unsigned). No version bump / no website rebuild / no fieldkit release. Earlier same session: get.orionfold.com bootstrap script delivered.
